evidence_hints: PWM on /pwm pegs at 255 for all 4 motors starting at ~12.0s
/odom/pose yaw and y drift from /reference after ~15.0s
/cmd_vel linear command keeps rising while pose stops tracking
patch_hint: Add anti-windup to PIDController.step: only accumulate the integral when the unclamped output is inside [PWM_MIN, PWM_MAX] or when the error would reduce saturation.
